source_pr.title: store/tikv: clean up stale tests
source_pr.body:
Signed-off-by: disksing <i@disksing.com>

### What problem does this PR solve?
Integration tests are moved to `tikv/client-go`: https://github.com/tikv/client-go/pull/82

Part of https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/22513

### What is changed and how it works?
What's Changed:
- remove stale tests

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->
Tests 
- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->
- No release note

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR removes stale `store/tikv/tests` integration tests after they were moved to `tikv/client-go`. The change is a bulk deletion/cleanup and does not include a targeted stabilization fix or concrete flaky failure signature for this catalog entry; CI logs/repro are needed to determine whether any flakiness existed and why.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: evidence: -// The test takes too long under the race detector.

files: store/tikv/tests/1pc_test.go, store/tikv/tests/2pc_fail_test.go, store/tikv/tests/2pc_slow_test.go, store/tikv/tests/2pc_test.go, store/tikv/tests/async_commit_fail_test.go, store/tikv/tests/async_commit_test.go, store/tikv/tests/client_fp_test.go, store/tikv/tests/delete_range_test.go, store/tikv/tests/isolation_test.go, store/tikv/tests/lock_test.go, store/tikv/tests/prewrite_test.go, store/tikv/tests/range_task_test.go, store/tikv/tests/rawkv_test.go, store/tikv/tests/safepoint_test.go, store/tikv/tests/scan_mock_test.go, store/tikv/tests/scan_test.go, store/tikv/tests/snapshot_fail_test.go, store/tikv/tests/snapshot_test.go, store/tikv/tests/split_test.go, store/tikv/tests/store_fail_test.go, store/tikv/tests/store_test.go, store/tikv/tests/ticlient_slow_test.go, store/tikv/tests/ticlient_test.go, store/tikv/tests/util_test.go
